title: Policy Advances Audit
description: Verify or implement five policy advance gaps from ralplan-policy-advances-audit: F1 closed, M5-intercept, M5-value, M6-decoder-carry, M6-ships.

stories.title: F1 masked-attention regression guard
acceptance_criteria: Test asserts inactive planet rows receive zero attention contribution in transformer encoder
make test-domain-features passes

stories.title: M5-intercept edge_rank_mode
acceptance_criteria: TaskConfig.edge_rank_mode supports snapshot and intercept_min
intercept_min ranks top-K by min anchor intercept distance
Default snapshot preserves existing golden tests
make test-domain-features passes
stories.verification_evidence: TaskConfig.edge_rank_mode snapshot|intercept_min; _intercept_min_distance_matrix in features.py; tests in test_intercept_edge_features.py; make test-domain-features pass

stories.title: M5-intercept projected target_ships
acceptance_criteria: Edge catalog adds per-anchor projected target_ships
Schema bumps if edge dim changes
Golden tests cover projected ships
stories.verification_evidence: target_ships_s1/s6 per anchor in edge catalog; E=19 schema v5; projected ships in features.py; golden tests test_projected_target_ships_*; make test-domain-features 20/20

stories.title: M5-value categorical critic
acceptance_criteria: ModelConfig.value_head=distributional with value_bins/value_max
CategoricalValueHead returns scalar expected value from bin logits
PPO value loss uses cross-entropy on projected returns
make test-fast passes
stories.verification_evidence: make test-fast: 171 passed. Added CategoricalValueHead, ModelConfig.value_bins/value_max, distributional PPO CE loss, conf/model/distributional_value.yaml, tests/test_distributional_value.py (7 tests).

stories.title: M6-decoder-carry
acceptance_criteria: model.decoder_carry flag gates cross-turn GRU state
Rollout carry resets decoder hidden on terminal
Submission runtime mirrors carry when enabled
stories.verification_evidence: model.decoder_carry flag; rollout carry resets on terminal via reset_decoder_hidden_on_done; submission_runtime compile_shielded_policy_act_with_carry. tests/test_decoder_carry.py (3 tests). make test-fast 178 passed.

stories.title: M6-ships continuous fraction
acceptance_criteria: task.ship_action_mode=buckets|continuous_fraction
Continuous mode uses sigmoid fraction head
Action builders map fraction to ship count
Shield validates continuous counts
stories.verification_evidence: task.ship_action_mode=buckets|continuous_fraction; sigmoid fraction head (Dense(1)); ship_count_for_fraction_jax + validate_continuous_ship_launch_jax; builders/PPO/action_codec wired. tests/test_continuous_ship_action.py (4 tests). make test-fast 178 passed.
